case_title: AMERICAN ROOFING CO. VS. RENE PEINADO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SAM LAW FILED BY AMERICAN ROOFING CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2011 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AMERICAN ROOFING CO. AS TO DEFENDANT PEINADO, RENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) SERVED SEP-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEINADO, RENE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2011 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: SAM LAW. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ROOFING CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ROOFING CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PEINADO, RENE DEFAULT JUDGMENT CANNOT BE ENTERED AS THE CONTRACT WAS UNSIGNED BY DEFENDANT, AND THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE OF DEFENDANT'S NON-MILITARY STATUS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
